inputs.label: Start Day
inputs.businessContext: The day component of the start date for calculating working days.

inputs.label: Start Month
inputs.businessContext: The month component (1-12) of the start date.

inputs.label: Start Year
inputs.businessContext: The year component of the start date.

inputs.label: End Day
inputs.businessContext: The day component of the end date.

inputs.label: End Month
inputs.businessContext: The month component (1-12) of the end date.

inputs.label: End Year
inputs.businessContext: The year component of the end date.

formulas.weekdaysCount: var start=new Date(startYear,startMonth-1,startDay);var end=new Date(endYear,endMonth-1,endDay);var count=0;var d=new Date(start);while(d<=end){if(d.getDay()!==0&&d.getDay()!==6)count++;d.setDate(d.getDate()+1);}return count;
formulas.weekendDays: var start=new Date(startYear,startMonth-1,startDay);var end=new Date(endYear,endMonth-1,endDay);var total=Math.floor((end-start)/(1000*60*60*24))+1;var weekdays=0;var d=new Date(start);while(d<=end){if(d.getDay()!==0&&d.getDay()!==6)weekdays++;d.setDate(d.getDate()+1);}return total-weekdays;
